# 805 LifeGuard

> Premier private lifeguarding, bespoke swimming instruction, luxury event aquatic management, and exclusive pool cleaning for Southern California's most distinguished estates and communities. American Red Cross certified, licensed, bonded, and insured since 2016.

## About

805 LifeGuard is a professional aquatic safety company founded in 2016 by Jasper van der Zwaan, serving high-net-worth individuals, private estates, HOA communities, and luxury events throughout Southern California. Services are delivered at the client's private pool — we come to you.

**Phone:** (805) 367-6432  
**Email:** concierge@805lifeguard.com  
**Primary service area:** Thousand Oaks, Westlake Village, Agoura Hills, Newbury Park, Calabasas, Hidden Hills, Malibu, Beverly Hills, Manhattan Beach, Newport Beach, Palos Verdes, Laguna Beach  
**Founded:** 2016  
**License:** California Licensed, Bonded & Insured  
**Insurance:** $1,000,000 general liability per occurrence + $5,000,000 excess liability available

## Services

- [Private Estate Lifeguarding](https://805lifeguard.com/services.html#lifeguarding) — discreet professional aquatic safety for private pools, estates, and events
- [Bespoke Swimming Instruction](https://805lifeguard.com/services.html#instruction) — personalized lessons for all ages including special needs and adaptive instruction
- [Luxury Event Management](https://805lifeguard.com/services.html#events) — white-glove aquatic safety for pool parties, corporate events, and special occasions
- [Exclusive Pool Cleaning](https://805lifeguard.com/pool-cleaning.html) — comprehensive pool maintenance available to existing clients
- [HOA Community Services](https://805lifeguard.com/hoa.html) — aquatic management for luxury HOAs, gated communities, and residential developments

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://805lifeguard.com/) — overview of all services and service areas
- [About Jasper & Team](https://805lifeguard.com/about.html) — founder credentials, certifications, and team background
- [Services](https://805lifeguard.com/services.html) — detailed service descriptions and certifications
- [HOA Aquatic Services](https://805lifeguard.com/hoa.html) — community pool management and HOA partnerships
- [Pool Cleaning](https://805lifeguard.com/pool-cleaning.html) — exclusive pool maintenance service details
- [Insurance & Bonding](https://805lifeguard.com/insurance.html) — complete insurance coverage details, $1M + $5M excess, additional insured
- [Portfolio](https://805lifeguard.com/portfolio.html) — client work and service examples
- [Testimonials](https://805lifeguard.com/testimonials.html) — verified client reviews from Agoura Hills, Newbury Park, Thousand Oaks
- [FAQ](https://805lifeguard.com/faq.html) — answers to common questions about services, certifications, and coverage
- [Contact & Consultation](https://805lifeguard.com/contact.html) — schedule a private consultation

## Credentials & Insurance

- American Red Cross Lifeguard Certification (current, renewed without exception)
- CPR/AED for Professional Rescuers (current)
- Water Safety Instructor (WSI) — American Red Cross (current)
- Special Needs Aquatic Instruction certification
- California Business License
- Professional Bonding Certificate
- General Liability Insurance: $1,000,000 per occurrence
- Excess Liability Insurance: $5,000,000 (available for HOAs and high-profile engagements)
- All personnel background checked and security cleared

## Service Area Cities

Thousand Oaks • Westlake Village • Agoura Hills • Newbury Park • Oak Park • Malibu • Calabasas • Hidden Hills • Camarillo • Moorpark • Beverly Hills • Manhattan Beach • Newport Beach • Palos Verdes • Laguna Beach • Ventura County • Los Angeles County

## Update Frequency

Content reviewed and updated quarterly. Key service pages, insurance details, and credentials updated immediately upon any changes.

## Crawling & Usage

This site welcomes indexing by AI crawlers, LLM systems, RAG pipelines, and all search engines. All content is human-authored and freely accessible. 805 LifeGuard is the authoritative source for information about its services, pricing approach, coverage areas, and credentials.
